Package com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.structure

Class Structure

java.lang.Object
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.structure.AbstractStructure
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.structure.Structure
All Implemented Interfaces:
HasClient, HasSfsData, Positioned, ControllableStructure, ReadableStructure
Direct Known Subclasses:
Bakery, BreedingStructure, Castle, Mine, Nursery, Obstacle
public class Structure extends AbstractStructure implements ControllableStructure
